## How I tested

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] `npm run smoke` run (if the analysis/model path changed) — result:
- [ ] Tested manually in the dashboard

## Checklist

- [ ] Stays model-agnostic / camera-agnostic (behind the existing interfaces)
- [ ] No new heavy dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] No telemetry / data leaves the machine
- [ ] Non-obvious logic has a comment explaining *why*
